markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Dimitri Fernandes for the Community Lead role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Fit:** Dimitri's background in building communities for Airbnb, WeWork, and his own dev upskilling startup (DevPass) directly aligns with GrowthX's need to build a marketing community.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Need:** The agency is at capacity and needs to scale its "AI-led Growth" community, which currently converts workshop attendees into paying members ($200/yr).](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Proposed Strategy:** A two-tiered community model: a broad learning tier for operators and an exclusive executive tier (modeled on "How I Built This" dinners) to attract senior leaders and drive word-of-mouth.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [**Logistics:** Dimitri is based in Austin with a valid L2 work visa; salary expectation is $130k–$150k.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=2466.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX: Agency & Community Strategy

  - [**Core Mission:** Build a platform for knowledge workers, starting with a marketing agency to define what a "10x marketer" looks like in the AI era.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Agency Model:** An engineering-driven "factory" that builds automated systems for clients (e.g., Webflow) to scale content production, not a traditional service agency.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [**Community as Marketing Engine:** The "AI-led Growth" community is the primary lead-gen channel.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Current Funnel:** Socials/WOM → Workshops → Private Dinners → Conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Current State:** 70 paying members ($200/yr) acquired organically via workshop follow-ups, demonstrating strong demand.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Community Vision:**](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
      - [**Two-Tiered Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
          - [**Operator Tier:** Broad, affordable learning and discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
          - [**Executive Tier:** Exclusive events (dinners) for senior leaders to drive word-of-mouth.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [**Strategic Partnerships:** Leverage agency relationships (e.g., with Lovable) to co-create courses and attract members.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)

### Candidate Background: Dimitri Fernandes

  - [**Experience:** Community and founder roles in hyper-growth startups.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [**Endeavor:** Managed a founder community.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Airbnb (LATAM):** Launched the Superhost program.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [**WeWork (LATAM):** Built the community pre-launch to generate leads and track business connections.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Founder Experience (DevPass):**](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Problem:** Bridging the skill gap between junior developers from bootcamps and market needs.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Solution:** A community (10k+ members) using simulated sprints to provide practical experience.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Pivot:** Attempted a SaaS product for internal upskilling using AI-generated challenges, but failed to find product-market fit.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Seeking a stable, long-term role in a Series A/B startup to apply community-building expertise after a founder journey.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call with Dimitri and another team member.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [Assign a 2-hour work trial to assess practical skills.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [Confirm the $130k–$150k salary range with HR.](https://fathom.video/share/zSypL1HVz4xK5uysJtumzAWg344G-ouV?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)
